data.name: 3 Days in Another World
data.detailed_description:
What will you do when you find yourself in another world?

  • 150+ images of girls, all made in anime style

  • 5 different girls, each one looks different

  • 17 endings

Being imprisoned in a dungeon, no one leaves you even the right to decide for yourself. All that remains is blind submission.

Queen sending you to another world, as a guinea pig, no one cares about you or your fate. But no one knows what awaits you in the other world.

Maybe this world not that bad?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon® XP
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon® XP
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
